name: structured-output-across-providers
description: Gets reliable structured output from LLM calls when supporting multiple providers with inconsistent tool-calling and structured output capabilities. TRIGGER when: building an agent that must work across multiple LLM providers, parsing structured JSON from LLM responses without native tool calling, LLM-based classification or selection step produces unparseable output, adding fallback logic for structured output extraction.
author: Assaf Elovic
